class.name: HPAMasterNode
class.brief_description: The master node for the high performance agents plugin. Should be the one and only node in your main scene.
class.description: Runs [member num_envs] parallel instances of [member environment_scene] in separate SubViewports, and synchronizes observations and actions with a Python training process via POSIX shared memory and semaphores. The shared memory region and semaphores are identified by [member ipc_name]. On [method Node._ready], the node initializes the IPC transport and quits the application if initialization fails. Call [method _ipc_exchange] once per training step to write observations into shared memory, signal Python, wait for Python's action response, and read it back.

members.member: The scene that represents the complete simulation environment. One instance is created per parallel environment.
Number of environments to run in parallel.
The resolution of the agent's visual observation space.

Identifier used to name the POSIX shared memory region ([code]/[ipc_name][/code]) and semaphores ([code]/[ipc_name]_env_ready[/code], [code]/[ipc_name]_act_ready[/code]). Must match the name used on the Python side.
